# Koko Express — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Koko Express is a nationwide courier and delivery company that specializes in door-to-door delivery services across the country. The brand focuses on convenience, reliability, and bringing packages directly to customers' homes, emphasizing a personal and accessible delivery experience.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Koko Express
Koko Express is a nationwide courier and delivery company that specializes in door-to-door delivery services across the country. The brand focuses on convenience, reliability, and bringing packages directly to customers' homes, emphasizing a personal and accessible delivery experience.

## Services/Products
- שליחיות ארצית
- משלוח עד בית הלקוח

## Target Audience
לקוחות פרטיים ועסקיים הזקוקים לשירותי משלוח עד הבית

## Industry
לוגיסטיקה ומשלוחים
